evidence: "This movie is based on the true story of Sean Porter... What follows is a nice story with genuine emotion and character building."
"This movie has a great cast, wonderful songs and a good storyline."
"The movie starts off at 1951 and ends in 1980... it is a major letdown."
"There are four intertwined stories... you find out towards the end."
"The first hour and a half of the movie is spent just getting Rani Mukherjee and Salman Khan married."
"The acting is really good. The songs are ok, I was expecting better songs with AR Rehman as the music director."
"The cinematography, storyline and acting are good."
"The Rock/Dwayne Johnson has definitely grown as an actor; he delivers his lines with conviction."
"Meryl Streep was great as the boss from hell."
"The architecture in these cities shown in the DVD is amazing."
"The scenery for South Carolina, Mexico and Greece is nice."
"The only thing missing was a good storyline."
"The scene where he thanks American soldiers is enough to make anyone teary eyed."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly drama and documentary, with a strong appreciation for emotional storytelling and sensory experiences. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for engaging yet straightforward narratives.
